title: onosma khorramabadensis
intro: Onosma khorramabadensis, also known as a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, is a medicinal plant native to Iran. This plant has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Onosma khorramabadensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of this plant may be used in traditional medicine, often in the form of teas, tinctures, or infusions, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
